name: Velocity Global EOR API
what_it_does: Enterprise-grade global Employer of Record (EOR) platform operating in 185+ countries with proprietary infrastructure (not third-party aggregators) — providing employment contracts, payroll, benefits, and compliance with HRIS integration API for large enterprises.
use_cases: Onboarding international employees via EOR with own-entity infrastructure in 185+ countries
Integrating Velocity Global employee data with enterprise HRIS (Workday, SAP) via API
Managing global benefits administration across multiple countries via platform API
Querying employment and payroll data for enterprise financial consolidation
Automating employment lifecycle events via webhook notifications
not_for: Startups and early-stage companies needing affordable entry-level EOR
Pure contractor management without full-time employment needs
Teams wanting self-serve API without enterprise sales engagement
best_when: A large enterprise needs EOR in 100+ countries with own-entity infrastructure (not aggregator model), strong compliance, and enterprise HRIS integration.
avoid_when: You need affordable startup pricing, self-serve access, or primarily contractor management (not full-time employment).

auth.notes: OAuth2 with scoped access tokens for enterprise HRIS integration. Client credentials for M2M. API access via enterprise contract. Scopes for HR data read, payroll read, benefits admin.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing per employee
pricing.paid_tiers: EOR from $599/employee/month; volume discounts for large deployments
pricing.notes: Premium enterprise EOR pricing. Own-entity model in 185+ countries (differentiator vs aggregators). Denver-based unicorn. Backed by General Atlantic. Strong Workday and SAP HRIS integration. Known for enterprise compliance and benefits expertise. API via enterprise partnership.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Enterprise REST API for employee management, payroll, benefits, and compliance data. OAuth2 with scopes for HRIS integration. Webhook support for employment events. API primarily for enterprise HRIS connectors — not self-serve. Employee onboarding involves legal review steps.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee record reads idempotent. Onboarding operations sequential with legal review gates. Payroll queries idempotent. Status updates create audit trail entries.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires enterprise contract — substantial commitment required
Own-entity model means data models vary by country (not aggregator)
Employee onboarding has legal review gates — cannot fully automate
Enterprise pricing ($599+/employee/month) limits accessible use cases

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and ISO27001 certified. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 with scopes. US and EU data residency. Own-entity model — no third-party EOR aggregator risk. Enterprise-grade security with annual contract security reviews.
